name: agentic-development-system
description: Spec Kit-aware governance shim for auditing and initializing agentic development safely.

interface.shortDescription: Audit repos and gate Spec Kit initialization.
interface.longDescription: Install a reusable Codex workflow for project-layer audit, Spec Kit readiness detection, mature-project protection, baseline-aware TODO auditing, sensitive and multi-repo boundaries, and routing rules for Spec Kit, ADR, Superpowers, plan-cross-validation, ast-grep, and optional capability slots.
defaultPrompt: Use $agentic-project-init to audit this repo before implementation and report blockers, Spec Kit policy, and next route.
